zh.lifeSummary: Anne Hendley是Sir Walter Hendley的女兒，於1521年出生在英國英格蘭肯特可藍別盧可。她於大約1540年與Richard Covert VII在英國英格蘭素可海沃茲 希斯結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和9個女兒的父母。她去世於1566年4月10日在英國英格蘭素可海沃茲 希斯享年45歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素可海沃茲 希斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Anne Hendley是Sir Walter Hendley的女儿，于1521年出生在英国英格兰肯特可藍別盧可。她于大约1540年与Richard Covert VII在英国英格兰素可海沃茲 希斯结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和9个女儿的父母。她去世于1566年4月10日在英国英格兰素可海沃茲 希斯享年45岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素可海沃茲 希斯。

nameMeanings.name: Hendley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Hanley or else a variant of Henley with intrusive -d-.

variants.name: Hanley
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Conor, Declan, Donovan, Eamonn, John Patrick.

Irish: shortened form of O'Hanley, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hÁinle ‘descendant of Áinle’, a personal name meaning ‘champion’. This is the name of a former ruling family in Connacht and is now common throughout southern Ireland.

English: habitational name from any of the many places called Handley (Cheshire, Derbyshire, Dorset, Northamptonshire) or Hanley (Staffordshire, Worcestershire), named with Old English hēan, the weak dative form (originally used after a preposition and article) of hēah ‘high’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

en.lifeSummary: Anne Hendley was born in 1521, in Cranbrook, Kent, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Sir Walter Hendley. She married Richard Covert VII about 1540, in Haywards Heath, Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 9 daughters. She died on 10 April 1566, in Haywards Heath, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45, and was buried in Haywards Heath, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Anne Hendley est née en 1521, à Cranbrook, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Sir Walter Hendley. Elle a épousé Richard Covert VII environ 1540, à Haywards Heath, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 9 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 avril 1566, à Haywards Heath, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à Haywards Heath, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat um 1540 in Haywards Heath, Sussex, England, United Kingdom Richard Covert VII geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. April 1566 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Haywards Heath, Sussex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Haywards Heath, Sussex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Anne Hendley è nata il nel 1521 nel Cranbrook, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Sir Walter Hendley. Lei sposato Richard Covert VII circa 1540, nel Haywards Heath, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 9 figlie. Morì il 10 aprile 1566, nel Haywards Heath, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolta a Haywards Heath, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Hendleyは1521年にイギリスイギリスケントクランブルークでSir Walter Hendleyの娘として生まれた。約1540年にイギリスイギリススセックスヘイワーズ ヒースでRichard Covert VIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼女は1566年4月10日にイギリスイギリススセックスヘイワーズ ヒースで45歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススセックスヘイワーズ ヒースにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Hendley(은)는 1521년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 크랜브룩에서 Sir Walter Hendley의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1540년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 헤이워스 히스에서 Richard Covert VII(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1566년 4월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 헤이워스 히스에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 헤이워스 히스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Anne Hendley nasceu em 1521, em Cranbrook, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Sir Walter Hendley. Ela casou-se com Richard Covert VII aproximadamente 1540, em Haywards Heath, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 9 filhas. Ela faleceu em 10 de abril de 1566, em Haywards Heath, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 45 anos, e foi sepultada em Haywards Heath, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Anne Hendley родилась в 1521 г. в местности кранбрук, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Sir Walter Hendley. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Covert VII около 1540 г. в местности хеивардс хит, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 9 дочерей. Она умерла 10 апреля 1566 г. в местности хеивардс хит, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет и была похоронена в местности хеивардс хит, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Richard Covert VII aproximadamente 1540, en Haywards Heath, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió el 10 de abril de 1566, en Haywards Heath, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultada en Haywards Heath, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
